companyNameJapanese: 江蘇長電科技股份有限公司
description: China's largest and world's third-largest OSAT company. Provides IC system integration packaging design, technology development, wafer probing, wafer-level packaging, system-level packaging, and chip testing services. Production bases in Korea, Singapore, China (Shanghai, Jiangyin, Chuzhou, Suqian).

_externalRelationships.notes: World #3 OSAT with 12% market share. FY2024 revenue: ~$5.0B (+19.3% YoY). Listed on Shanghai Stock Exchange (600584.SS). SMIC is second-largest shareholder. Leading in SiP and Chiplet technologies. Chinese domestic dicing/probing equipment from Heyan, Guangli, Sidea being validated on production lines.
